name: Premium Full Detail
description: Our premier, all-inclusive restoration package. Combining paint purification, gloss-enhancement, and hot-steam interior sanitation to reset your vehicle to showroom-grade perfection.

exterior: Full clay bar paint decontamination & iron removal
High-gloss Carnauba wax & polymer sealant shield
Hot steam detailing of door & trunk jambs
interior: Deep cabin hot steam disinfection & sanitizing
Full carpet, mat & upholstery shampoo extraction
Premium leather restoration & UV protectant shield
Meticulous cleaning of console, dash & air vents

name: Signature Interior Detail
description: Complete cabin renewal. Focuses on deep extraction, heavy stain removal, steam sterilization of contact points, and UV surface protection for a clean, odor-free cockpit.
features: Deep hot-steam sterilization of all contact points
Full carpet, fabric seat & floor mat hot extraction
Detailed scrub of dashboard, console & door panels

name: Signature Exterior Detail
description: Professional exterior restoration. Safe hand wash, complete paint decontamination, and premium wax coating to maximize depth, shine, and shield against environmental damage.
features: Chemical iron spot & physical clay bar decontamination
Premium Carnauba wax & high-gloss sealant glaze
Precision rim deep cleaning & satin tire dressing
Steam cleaning of all door & trunk jambs
